title: The Fabulous Suzanne
writer: William Bowers, Tedwell Chapman, Randall Faye
actors: Barbara Britton, Rudy Vallee, Otto Kruger
plot: Suzanne, a waitress, comes up with a sure-fire method for winning at the racetrack and, later, when she inherits a fortune from a customer of the restaurant, she use the same system for investing her money. Her stuff broker tries ...
